channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: I spent two weeks with the gorgeous Philips Café Aromis espresso machine, and creating delicious custom coffees has never been so much fun
item.description: Even if you have no barista experience, Aromis has a chatbot-style assistant that will help you tweak the brew settings until your coffee tastes perfect.

item.title: 'A great OLED TV with a few frustrations': I reviewed the LG B6, and it brings some much needed extra brightness to the B-series for HDR punch — but it's a shame a few things hold back it from perfection
item.description: The LG B6 brings B-series brightness to a new level with great performance and features, but a couple of setbacks stop it from being truly perfect.

item.title: MSI's next-gen monitor can switch between three resolutions and refresh rates
item.description: Go from 4K resolution for Crimson Desert to 680Hz for Counter-Strike 2.
